'''Hawkbat Battalion''' was a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] commanded by [[Clone major/Legends|Clone Major]] [[Twelve]], and was one of four battalions under the [[101st Regiment]]. It sorted under the 101st Regiment, [[7th Legion]], [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]], [[Second Army|2nd Sector Army]], and [[Systems Army Alpha]].

==Description==
Hawkbat Battalion was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="GAR Guide" /> Hawkbat Battalion was part of the [[3rd Brigade]]<ref name="GentleGiant" /> and the [[101st Regiment]], both of which were units under the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps']] [[7th Legion]]. Hawkbat Battalion itself consisted of 576 troopers divided into four [[Company/Legends|companies]], including [[Bacta Company]] and [[K Company]], with the battalion falling under the command of [[Clone major/Legends|Clone Major]] [[Twelve]].<ref name="GAR Guide" />

Bacta Company was commanded by [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone Captain]] [[Tyto (Bacta Company)|Tyto]], while K Company was led by Clone Captain [[Deviss/Legends|Deviss]].<ref name="GAR Guide" /> Hawkbat Battalion's clone troopers wore [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]], sometimes accompanied by [[Color/Legends|brown]] rain ponchos, and were supported by [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunships]].<ref name="CW 1" />

==History==
One of the first [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] units to be deployed, Hawkbat Battalion saw action during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. The battalion was given orders to march directly into the fire of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] spider droid column, and decimated almost to the last man. Captain Deviss, the leader of [[K Company]], heroically stayed behind in a shallow bomb crater, risking his own life to tend to two critically injured soldiers. After defending their position for three hours, the [[Casualty-evacuation|casevac]] team finally arrived. His men rescued, Deviss was honored with a medal and given a new command.<ref name="GAR Guide" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Hasbro]] sold a figure of a Hawkbat Battalion trooper in [[2007]] as part of their Thirtieth Anniversary Collection. Other figures of the series, such as the [[Advanced Recon Commando heavy gunner|ARC heavy gunner]] and [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|clone SCUBA trooper]] were sold in the following year.
